text:
Hey <@&1424461167883194418>. We merged 50 PRs this week. Added a Z-axis, fired up some 5090s, and opened up the community models alpha.

## Weekly Update - 2026-07-05

**✨ Models & 3D**
- We do 3D now. Generate models via Trellis 2 and Rodin 2.5. Prices and icons are live in the dashboard.
- Added `nanobanana-2-lite` and `claude-sonnet-5` (via Bedrock). `claude-fable-5` is back.
- `gpt-image-2` now supports arbitrary resolutions and passes the quality parameter correctly.
- Audio fix: repaired WAV header size fields in the chat completions audio path.

**🤝 Community Models (Alpha)**
- Community text endpoints are live and documented. We've started allowlisting creators.
- Added auto-deactivation for unstable community models so they return a clean 400 instead of throwing 500s when they fall over.

**⚙️ Infrastructure & Auth**
- `flux` is now routing to our self-hosted Vast.ai RTX 5090 pool (with Fireworks fallback).
- Shipped OAuth 2.1 authorization-code grant with PKCE + RFC 8414 discovery.
- Added a new `/v1/models/status` endpoint backed by a Tinybird proxy with caching.

**🪙 Ecosystem & Quests**
- Search fees for Perplexity/Gemini are now itemized billing adjustments.
- The "App Listed" quest is enabled. Get your app in the ecosystem, get Pollen.
- The Greenhouse is booming: 14 new apps added this week (shoutout to Elfy AI, Imagipedia, PolliCross, and the rest).

Go build something weird.
